message.content: ["We propose a unified framework in which spacetime geometry, inertia, and vacuum energy emerge from an underlying stochastic substrate modeled as a Dense Associative Memory (DAM).", "In the coarse-grained limit this system behaves as a compressible quantum fluid supporting a topological lattice of linked vortex dipoles (Vortons).", "Starting from Langevin dynamics we derive an effective field theory whose hydrodynamic limit reproduces the Madelung equations, with the quantum potential arising natural."]

In the coarse-grained limit this system behaves as a compressible quantum fluid supporting a topological lattice of linked vortex dipoles (Vortons). Starting from Langevin dynamics we derive an effective field theory whose hydrodynamic limit reproduces the Madelung equations, with the quantum potential arising natural"
